ruleset.name: Solubris Custom Rules
ruleset.description: Custom PMD rules for detecting code quality issues

rule.name: ExcessiveMockingOnSameObjectRule
rule.message: Excessive mocking on {0}: {1} calls detected. Maximum allowed: {2}
rule.description: Detects when a single mock object has excessive Mockito when() calls within a method. This can indicate that a test is testing too much or that the mock setup is overly complex.

rule.name: GetterMethodRule
rule.description: Detects getter methods that violate conventions. Only applies to methods that follow the proper getter naming pattern (getXxx where Xxx starts with a capital letter): - Getter methods should have no parameters (configurable maximum) - Getter methods should have 1 statement (configurable maximum) - Getter methods should not be static (optional) - Getter methods should not be final (optional) - Getter methods should be public (optional) Methods that violate these rules should be renamed to determine/produce/find/extract. Note: Methods like get(), gettable(), getter() are ignored as they don't follow the proper getter pattern.

rule.name: UnmodifiableSetCollectorRule
rule.description: Flags usages of .collect(Collectors.toSet()) and suggests replacing with .collect(toUnmodifiableSet()).
